mapper.insert: INSERT INTO selenium(seleniumTitle, seleniumAddress, seleniumDetailNote, seleniumActionSteps, seleniumGroupName, seleniumGroupFullPath, seleniumGroupParentPath, seleniumRegistrant, seleniumRegistrationDate) VALUES(#{seleniumTitleView}, #{seleniumAddressView}, #{seleniumDetailNoteView}, #{seleniumActionStepsView}, #{seleniumGroupName}, #{seleniumGroupFullPath}, #{seleniumGroupParentPath}, #{seleniumRegistrant}, #{seleniumRegistrationDate});
mapper.update: UPDATE selenium SET seleniumTitle = #{seleniumTitleView}, seleniumAddress = #{seleniumAddressView}, seleniumDetailNote = #{seleniumDetailNoteView}, seleniumActionSteps = #{seleniumActionStepsView}, seleniumGroupName = #{seleniumGroupName}, seleniumGroupFullPath = #{seleniumGroupFullPath}, seleniumGroupParentPath = #{seleniumGroupParentPath}, seleniumModifier = #{seleniumModifier}, seleniumModifiedDate = #{seleniumModifiedDate} WHERE seleniumKeyNum = ${seleniumKeyNum};

UPDATE selenium SET seleniumGroupFullPath = #{seleniumGroupFullPath}, seleniumGroupParentPath = #{seleniumGroupParentPath}, seleniumGroupName = #{seleniumGroupName} WHERE seleniumGroupFullPath = #{ordSeleniumGroupFullPath};
